name: @gotong/example-cross-hub-federation
description: Cross-hub federation over a REAL WebSocket (跨组织联邦, 真网络). Boots two real hubs in one process, dials org A → org B over a real ws transport with a bearer token on BOTH sides, then runs the full cross-hub workflow + outbound-approval story across the wire — approve crosses the org boundary, reject fails closed, and a WRONG-token peer is rejected at the handshake. The WS-transport twin of cross-hub-workflow (which uses an inproc link). Deterministic, no API key.
